headline: ECB Signals Caution on Eurozone Rate Cuts Amid Inflation Concerns
analysis: ECB officials express caution on aggressive rate-cutting plans. Core inflation remains sticky in services. Mixed signals keep EUR supported around 1.0850 USD.

headline: S&P 500 Reaches New All-Time High at 5,450 Points
analysis: Tech stocks lead rally on AI enthusiasm and strong earnings forecasts. NASDAQ +1.2%, S&P 500 +0.8%. Semiconductor strength (NVIDIA, TSMC) continues.

headline: STOXX 600 Gains 0.5% as Energy Stocks Rally on Oil Prices
analysis: European energy stocks outperform after Brent crude climbs to $82/bbl. Shell, TotalEnergies lead gains. German DAX +0.3%.

headline: Gold Slides 1.2% on Stronger USD and Lower Inflation Expectations
analysis: Gold spot price breaks below $2,050/oz as USD strength weighs. Risk-on sentiment reduces haven demand. February weakness continues.

headline: Bitcoin Rebounds 3.5% to $47,200; Institutional Inflows Resume
analysis: Large crypto fund reports strong inflows. Bitcoin breaks out of consolidation. Ethereum +2.8% to $2,650. ETH/USD pair stabilizes.

headline: Apple Reports Q1 Earnings Beat; iPhone 27 Sales Exceed Guidance
analysis: AAPL beats EPS and revenue estimates by 8%. Services segment +15% YoY. Stock rises 4.2% on guidance raise. Analyst upgrades follow.

headline: Fed Minutes Show Dovish Lean; Markets Price 50bp Rate Cuts by Q3
analysis: Latest FOMC minutes hint at inflation progress supporting future cuts. PCE expectations decline. 10Y Treasury yields fall to 3.75%. 2Y yields crater 15bp.

headline: European Indices Corrects Modestly; CAC 40 Down 0.4%
analysis: Profit-taking after weeks of gains. Luxury stocks (LVMH, Kering) pressured. Paris bourse closes lower on rotation out of discretionary.

headline: Nvidia Announces New H200 Ultra GPU; Stock Rallies 5.8%
analysis: NVDA unveils next-gen AI accelerator with 50% performance boost. Supply constraints ease in Q2. Analyst target raised to $250. Semiconductor ETF (SMH) +2.4%.

headline: Bank of England Holds Rates at 4.25%; Signals Possible Summer Cuts
analysis: BoE MPC votes unanimously to hold. Forward guidance suggests cuts possible if inflation cools further. GBP/USD weakness (-0.5%) on dovish tone.
